description: CQL's own gate configuration (dogfood). Only the deliberate gate-config surface lives here — base / tests.path_markers / high_risk_paths, plus the protect_harness guard key — read best-effort by the diff-grounded gates and the PreToolUse guard; everything else about the gates is deliberately not configurable. This is not a full orchestration config (profiles/steps live in assets/quality-loop.config.example.json): check-config validates it via the gate-config-only path (types checked, orchestration checks skipped, exit 0). No $schema pointer on purpose — the shipped schema models the full orchestration shape, which this gate-only file deliberately is not. tests.path_markers teaches the gates that evals/cases/ IS this repo's pinned test-fixture suite, so case-pinned releases no longer need a bugfix_test_waiver. Deliberately NOT evals/ wholesale: the eval runners embed weakening-marker fixture strings (t.Skip, #[ignore]) to test the detector itself, and marking them as tests would make the weakening gate flag its own fixtures. protect_harness is false HERE ONLY because this repo IS the harness: its gate scripts are the workpiece under constant edit, so the guard's harness-file denies would make developing CQL impossible; the always-on destructive-command layer still applies, and consumer installs keep the default (on).
